heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 1041 to 1053 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 1041, , pt. IV, § 401, , established Naval Reserve as Reserve component of Navy. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10108 of Title 10
Section 1042, , pt. IV, § 402, , established Marine Corps Reserve as reserve component of Marine Corps. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10109 of Title 10
Section 1043, , pt. IV, § 403, , provided that Coast Guard Reserve is reserve component of Coast Guard. See , Coast Guard.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 3701 of Title 14
Section 1044, , pt. IV, § 404, , provided for integration of Naval Reserve. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10108 of Title 10
Section 1045, , pt. IV, § 405, , provided for integration of Marine Corps Reserve. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10109 of Title 10
Section 1046, , pt. IV, § 406, , provided for integration of Coast Guard Reserve. See , Coast Guard.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499section 3701 of Title 14

Section 1047, , pt. IV, § 407, , provided for a Naval Reserve Policy Board, a Marine Corps Reserve Policy Board, a Coast Guard Policy Board, and for membership on such boards. See sections 10303 and 10304 of Title 10, Armed Forces, and , Coast Guard.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499section 3703 of Title 14

Section 1048, , pt. IV, § 409, , authorized Secretary of Navy to prescribe a suitable flag to be known as Naval Reserve flag, and provided class of vessels which may fly such flag. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499section 7225 of Title 10

Section 1049, , pt. IV, § 410, , authorized Secretary of Navy to prescribe a Naval Reserve yacht pennant and enumerated class of vessels which may fly such pennant. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499section 7226 of Title 10
Section 1050, , pt. IV, § 411, , related to appointment and duty of temporary officers in Naval Reserve and Marine Corps Reserve. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499section 603 of Title 10
Section 1051, , pt. IV, § 412, , related to temporary members of Coast Guard Reserve.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499
Section 1052, , pt. IV, § 413, , provided for a Retired Reserve, membership, pay, recall to active duty. See sections 6327 and 6483 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 499
Section 1053, , pt. IV, § 414, , related to applicability of laws to women in Naval Reserve, Marine Corps Reserve, and Coast Guard Reserve.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 500
